executives.name: Joe Graziano
executives.background: Mr Graziano is a qualified Chartered Accountant with over 30 years of experience in corporate advisory and financial management. He has served as a director and company secretary for several ASX-listed companies.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer, Company Secretary, Non-Executive Director
